_meta.purpose: Introduce version control systems for beginners in software development
_meta.notes: Focus on Git basics, collaboration, and real-world workflow understanding

_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder

title: Version Control
subtitle: track changes, collaborate, and build like professionals
overview: This session introduces version control systems and explains how developers track changes, collaborate in teams, and manage code history using tools like Git. Students learn why version control is essential in real-world software development.
learningOutcomes: Identify basic Git concepts (commit, repository, branch)
Recognize real-world use cases of version control

images._note: Add diagrams of Git workflow, branching trees, and collaboration examples.

gallery.caption: Version control tracks changes over time like a timeline tree
Each commit saves a snapshot of code changes
Merge conflicts happen when changes overlap
Students practicing Git commands and workflows

codeExamples.title: Initialize Git Repository
codeExamples.explanation: Creates a new Git repository in a project folder

codeExamples.title: Commit Changes
codeExamples.explanation: Saves a snapshot of the project with a message

codeExamples.title: Check Status
codeExamples.explanation: Shows current changes and file state

realWorldExamples.title: Team Software Development
realWorldExamples.desc: Multiple developers work on the same project using branches and merges.

realWorldExamples.title: Open Source Projects
realWorldExamples.desc: Thousands of contributors collaborate on GitHub using version control.

realWorldExamples.title: Bug Fixing Workflow
realWorldExamples.desc: Developers track bugs and fix them without breaking existing code.

activity.title: Simulate a Git Workflow
activity.objective: Understand version control through a hands-on classroom simulation
steps: Create a simple text file (story or code)
Make changes and save versions manually
Simulate branching by copying file versions
activity.output: Understanding of how Git tracks changes and supports teamwork

quiz.q: What is version control used for?
